precautions: Monitor for changes in size or color.

Melanoma.info: A serious form of skin cancer.

PNEUMONIA.info: Infection that inflames the air sacs in the lungs.
precautions: Monitor oxygen levels if breathing is difficult.

no_tumor.info: No visible tumor detected in the MRI.
precautions: Monitor for unusual headaches or vision changes.

glioma_tumor.info: A type of tumor that occurs in the brain and spinal cord.
precautions: Prepare for further imaging or biopsy.

meningioma_tumor.info: A tumor that arises from the meninges (membranes surrounding the brain/spinal cord).
precautions: Treatment depends on size and growth rate.

pituitary_tumor.info: Abnormal growths that develop in your pituitary gland.

normal.info: The eye appears clear and healthy.
precautions: Get routine eye exams every 1-2 years.
Follow the 20-20-20 rule for screen time.

cataract.info: Clouding of the normally clear lens of the eye.
precautions: Schedule an exam with an ophthalmologist.

glaucoma.info: A group of eye conditions that damage the optic nerve, often linked to high pressure.
precautions: Do not ignore blind spots or vision loss.
Requires prescription eye drops or surgery.

diabetic_retinopathy.info: A diabetes complication that affects eyes by damaging blood vessels in the retina.
precautions: Monitor for sudden vision changes or floaters.

onychomycosis.info: Fungal infection of the nail causing thickening and discolouration.
precautions: Keep nails meticulously clean and dry.
Wear sweat-absorbing socks and breathable shoes.
Avoid sharing nail clippers or files.

paronychia.info: Infection of the skin around the nail fold causing pain and swelling.
precautions: Soak the affected area in warm water 3-4 times a day.
Do not bite, pick, or manipulate the nail or cuticle.
Keep the area clean to prevent bacterial spread.
Consult a physician if pus develops or swelling worsens.

gingivitis.info: Inflammation of the gums caused by plaque build-up.
precautions: Brush teeth twice a day with fluoride toothpaste.
Floss daily to remove plaque between teeth.

mouth_ulcer.info: Painful sores inside the mouth that make eating and talking uncomfortable.
precautions: Avoid spicy, salty, or highly acidic foods.
Rinse mouth gently with warm salt water.
Use a soft-bristled toothbrush to avoid irritation.
